item.title: tournament-settings-persistence-bug
item.description: Tournament Settings Persistence Bug Fix Date Discovered: 2025-10-14 Date Fixed: 2025-10-15 Severity: HIGH (Production Blocker) Status: ✅ FIXED Problem Tournament settings (specifically useSettingsDisplayNames) not persisting from tournament creation to the actual created tournament in Firebase.

item.title: Documentation-Cross-Reference
item.description: Documentation Cross-Reference Index Purpose: This index maps documentation between the Git repository (docs/) and the Obsidian vault to maintain consistency and prevent duplication.
